title: rubus × rutilus
intro: Rubus × rutilus, a hybrid of the raspberry genus, is a type of thimbleberry plant known for its edible fruit and medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus × rutilus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Rubus × rutilus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
